other_observers: Duane Nelson Janeal Thompson; Duane Nelson
duration: 15 minutes (followed its call for another 15 minutes before we had a visual)
specific_location: far south end of Lamar Community College woods along Willow Creek
description: -drab gray-green crown and back -no wing bars -dark crown contrasted with the conspicuous white eyeline -dark lores -yellowish undertail and sides  -brightest yellow on throat -yellowish white on lower belly -assumed to be drab adult because it did not seem as bright as the one I photographed in my yardBehaviors: stayed hidden from view most of time in cottonwoods but it did become visible several times as it moved from tree to tree - fairly secretiveCall: Duane Nelson identified it by it's song - we were then able to follow it and get a visualPlumage: drab adult?
